g.text: Board memory budget + initial-board sources (back-fill for PR #6)
--max-board-memory bounds InMemoryBoard allocations. --initial-board picks one of four built-in seeders.
When the requested size exceeds the cap, the user gets a suggested override (and, since the streaming PR,
the initializer path auto-promotes to a StreamingBoard instead of failing).
All initializers implement BoardInitializer::initialize<B: BoardEditor + ?Sized>, so they work uniformly on
InMemoryBoard and StreamingBoard. New seeders can be added without touching board storage.
